parents.subject: LU-13783 procfs: fix improper prop_ops fields

commit.subject: LU-13587 tests: create pool vs access its info
commit.message:
LU-13587 tests: create pool vs access its info

Add test 75 to sanity-quota to check that race between
access to /proc/.../dt-pool_name/info of non-existed pool
with this pool creating doesn't cause a panic.

Test-Parameters: trivial testlist=sanity-quota env=ONLY=75
HPE-bug-id: LUS-9938
Change-Id: I38d05ef75122869e4a503d792b0f8cc0c33b2205
Signed-off-by: Sergey Cheremencev <c17829@cray.com>
Reviewed-on: https://es-gerrit.dev.cray.com/158594
Reviewed-by: Andriy Skulysh <c17819@cray.com>
Reviewed-by: Shaun Tancheff <stancheff@cray.com>
Tested-by: Elena Gryaznova <c17455@cray.com>
